message:
feat(session): add differential scanning with delta classification

Implements compute_diff() to compare two session snapshots, classifying
processes as new/resolved/changed/unchanged. Uses start_id for reliable
cross-session identity matching (not PID alone). Configurable score
drift threshold.

Closes process_triage-9k8.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
